overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The player moves from narrow alleys with pink and cyan neon lights through open plazas with holographic advertisements, ending with a view of towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk alley with neon storefronts

events.description: passes by two NPCs standing on the right side of the street
approaching intersection where narrow alley opens to wider plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down narrow neon-lit street with pink and cyan lighting, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: two characters in futuristic clothing standing near a doorway with neon lighting

entered.detail: building facade with vertical pink neon strip lighting
horizontal cyan neon light strips along building edge
circular metal manhole cover in asphalt street
steam rising from vent in the middle of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk alley at night, dominated by pink neon on the left building and cyan neon on the right. The camera moves forward past two NPCs standing near a doorway, continuing down the asphalt street with scattered trash and steam rising from a vent ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with commercial storefronts and neon signage

events.description: turns right at intersection to enter the plaza area
fully enters open plaza from narrow alley, Softsys sign becomes prominent

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and walking through the open plaza, following the flow of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: character wearing a blue robe walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: green neon sign reading 'softsys' on building facade
wide concrete pavement with geometric patterns replacing the narrow asphalt
building entrance with teal colored awning and neon trim

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the intersection, transitioning from the narrow alley into a wider open plaza. The green 'Softsys' neon sign dominates the left side while pedestrians walk in the same direction. The ground changes from asphalt to patterned concrete as the scene opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with large holographic advertisements and pedestrian crossings

events.description: large green holographic display comes into view on the left side
passes by a shirtless pedestrian walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza following a character in a blue robe, passing other pedestrians and approaching a large holographic display

notable_agents.action: character in blue robe with pink boots walking steadily ahead
shirtless character with gold chain and white shorts walking past camera

entered.detail: large floating green holographic advertisement with wireframe graphics
orange and white striped barriers along the street edge
tall street lamp illuminating the plaza

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open plaza, the camera approaches a massive green holographic display on the left showing wireframe graphics. The character in the blue robe continues ahead while other pedestrians cross paths. Orange barriers line the right side where the street begins.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with vehicle traffic and towering skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tall skyscrapers overhead
vehicles visible driving on the street ahead

agents.ego_description: slowing to look up at the towering skyscrapers while approaching a street with vehicle traffic

entered.detail: tall cylindrical and rectangular skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising high above
paved street with cars driving and street lights illuminating the area
tall residential or office building with many lit windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves past the green hologram toward a street with sparse vehicle traffic. The camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows against the night sky, showcasing the vertical scale of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway into a vast, towering urban plaza. It begins by moving forward through a narrow passage dominated by pink and cyan neon lights, passing NPCs and rising steam on an asphalt street. As the camera turns right at an intersection, the environment expands from the tight alley into a wide plaza where the ground shifts to patterned concrete and a green Softsys sign becomes prominent. The scene then opens further as the camera approaches a massive green wireframe holographic display and passes pedestrians and orange barriers. Finally, the movement leads toward a street with sparse traffic before tilting upward to reveal the immense vertical scale of illuminated skyscrapers against the night sky.
